summary: Iter 5 full regression + new Hermes module (15) testing. Backend: 41/41 pytest green (38 existing voice/whisper, deepseek/openrouter, chat-SSE, cross-dept, diagnostics, skills, market, memory, mentor, roi + 3 new hermes_health/jobs_list/job_create_no_crash). Frontend: 7/7 scenarios green including new HermesWidget on OpsDashboard (status online), HermesPanel drill-down with status/base_url 127.0.0.1:8642, create-job form submit with graceful error handling (no UI crash on Hermes 400), ops-back navigation, and full regression of 4 existing drill-downs (crossdept/diagnostics/skills/market) and 7 BottomNav items. Hermes gateway healthy via supervisor on :8642.

issues: Vertical scroll grows — 5 widgets + ops.cockpit header + BottomNav requires scrolling on 390px mobile viewport; acceptable but consider collapsing or 2-column layout if more modules are added.

critical_code_review_comments: hermes_proxy.py: clean async httpx wrapper with graceful 502 fallback on httpx.HTTPError — correct pattern; never raises into FastAPI handler.

HermesPanel.jsx: status defaults to 'offline' when health=null (initial state) which briefly flashes the 'Hermes API недоступен' warning before fetch resolves (~1s). Minor UX flicker — consider 'loading' state or skipping the warning until at least one fetch attempt has resolved.

OpsView.jsx: now fetches 5 endpoints in parallel on mount + 30s poll — fine for now, but if more modules added, consider staggering or moving Hermes health to a lighter poll (or on-demand) since it's an external service that may be slower.
CreateJobForm error display works correctly: shows 'Hermes недоступен (400)' when Hermes rejects (cron required), confirming proxy returns ok:false + status_code as designed. UI never crashes.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (added 3 new Hermes tests at the end)
test_credentials: n/a — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Existing /api/seed idempotent — no new seed data created in this iteration besides what previous tests inserted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hermes module 15 is fully wired. Backend proxy: /api/hermes/{health,chat,jobs} -> http://127.0.0.1:8642 (supervisor program hermes-gateway). Frontend testids: widget-hermes, ops-hermes, hermes-base-url, hermes-refresh, hermes-create-open, hermes-create-form, hermes-prompt, hermes-schedule, hermes-create-submit, hermes-job-{id}, hermes-empty. POST /api/hermes/jobs with minimal {prompt,deliver} returns ok:false status_code=400 (Hermes requires cron) — that's expected; proxy gracefully reports it. To create a successful job, payload must include a valid cron schedule. Sanity checks: curl http://127.0.0.1:8642/health -> {status:ok,platform:hermes-agent}; sudo supervisorctl status hermes-gateway -> RUNNING.
